summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 8 tests passed. Frontend admin panel verified via Playwright - shows 217 dishes, 189 indexed, 1632 images. S3 integration working with local fallback.

integration_issues.issue: Console errors for missing admin endpoints (api-usage, premium-users, settings) - non-critical

critical_code_review_comments: S3 rate limiting (503 errors) observed in logs but fallback to local disk working correctly
Some admin endpoints (api-usage, premium-users, settings) return 404 - may need implementation if required
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test image at /app/datasets/organized/Abobrinha Grelhada/20260125_112305.jpg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored to use MongoDB dish_storage + S3 Object Storage. All core endpoints working: /api/ai/status (189 dishes), /api/ai/identify (CLIP + Gemini), /api/admin/dishes (217 total), /api/admin/dishes-full, /api/admin/dish-image/{slug}, /api/upload/status. S3 may return 503 occasionally but local fallback works.

passed_tests: test_admin_dishes_full - /api/admin/dishes-full returns complete data with all_images
test_upload_status - /api/upload/status returns total_dishes and total_images from MongoDB
test_no_duplicate_slugs - No duplicate slugs in admin dishes list

frontend_verification.main_page: Loads correctly with camera permission dialog
frontend_verification.admin_panel: Shows 217 pratos, 189 PRATOS indexed, 1632 IMAGENS, STATUS ✅
frontend_verification.dish_images: Loading correctly from S3 (Abobora ao Curry: 52 imgs, Abobrinha Grelhada: 7 imgs)
